summary: Tested HR Rate Manager and Exely Rate Manager - two separate rate/availability management screens for HotelRunner and Exely channel managers. All 21 backend API tests passed. Both frontend pages load correctly with their respective room types, badges, and functionality.
features_tested: GET /api/channel-manager/hr-rate-manager/grid - Returns HR room types (Corner Süit, Standart Oda, Deluxe Oda, Default room type) with rate plan data
GET /api/channel-manager/hr-rate-manager/room-types - Returns HR room types and rate plans
GET /api/channel-manager/hr-rate-manager/push-providers - Returns HotelRunner in shadow mode
POST /api/channel-manager/hr-rate-manager/bulk-grid-update - Saves rate calendar data for HR rooms
GET /api/channel-manager/hr-rate-manager/stop-sale-summary - Returns stop sale data from hr_rate_calendar
GET /api/channel-manager/hr-rate-manager/holidays - Returns holiday periods
GET /api/channel-manager/hr-rate-manager/stop-sale-schedules - Returns list of schedules
GET /api/channel-manager/hr-rate-manager/pricing-settings - Returns pricing settings
PUT /api/channel-manager/hr-rate-manager/pricing-settings - Updates pricing settings
GET /api/channel-manager/rate-manager/grid - Returns Exely room types (Standart, Deluxe, Suite) with rate data
GET /api/channel-manager/rate-manager/room-types - Returns Exely room types and rate plans
GET /api/channel-manager/rate-manager/push-providers - Returns Exely (live) and HotelRunner (shadow)
POST /api/channel-manager/rate-manager/bulk-grid-update - Saves rate calendar data for Exely rooms
GET /api/channel-manager/rate-manager/stop-sale-summary - Returns stop sale data from rate_calendar
GET /api/channel-manager/rate-manager/holidays - Returns holiday periods
GET /api/channel-manager/rate-manager/stop-sale-schedules - Returns list of schedules
GET /api/channel-manager/rate-manager/pricing-settings - Returns pricing settings
Frontend: /hr-rate-manager page loads with HotelRunner room types
Frontend: /rate-manager page loads with Exely room types
Frontend: HR Rate Manager shows 'HotelRunner: Shadow Mode' badge (amber)
Frontend: Exely Rate Manager shows 'Exely: Push Aktif' badge (green)
Frontend: StopSalePanel uses correct API prefix for both pages

issues: i18n translation keys showing as raw text (common.welcome, auth.signIn, etc.) - pre-existing issue from iteration 170/171/172

frontend.hr_rate_manager_page_loads: PASSED - Title: HotelRunner - Fiyat ve Musaitlik
frontend.hr_rate_manager_room_types: PASSED - Corner Süit, Standart Oda, Deluxe Oda, Default room type
frontend.hr_rate_manager_tabs: PASSED - Toplu Guncelle, Takvim Gorunumu, Stop Sale
frontend.hr_rate_manager_calendar_grid: PASSED - Shows rates in TRY, availability, min stay
frontend.exely_rate_manager_page_loads: PASSED - Title: Exely - Fiyat ve Musaitlik
frontend.exely_rate_manager_badge: PASSED - Shows 'Exely: Push Aktif' (green) + 'HotelRunner: Shadow Mode' (amber)
frontend.exely_rate_manager_tabs: PASSED - Toplu Guncelle, Takvim Gorunumu, Stop Sale
frontend.exely_rate_manager_calendar_grid: PASSED - Shows rates in USD, availability, sold counts

critical_code_review_comments: Both HR Rate Manager and Exely Rate Manager are fully functional with separate data stores
HR uses hr_rate_calendar, hr_pricing_settings, hr_stop_sale_schedules MongoDB collections
Exely uses rate_calendar, pricing_settings, stop_sale_schedules MongoDB collections
StopSalePanel correctly accepts apiPrefix prop to route to correct backend
HR shows room types from hotelrunner_connections.cached_rooms (inv_code as identifier)
Exely shows room types from exely_connections.room_types
HotelRunner is in Shadow Mode (write_enabled=false) - writes are logged but not sent to HR API
Exely is in Live Mode (push_active=true) - writes are sent to Exely API
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_hr_exely_rate_managers.py - Created comprehensive test file for both rate managers
context_for_next_testing_agent: HR Rate Manager (/hr-rate-manager) and Exely Rate Manager (/rate-manager) are two separate pages for managing rates/availability for different channel managers. HR uses HotelRunner room types (Corner Süit, Standart Oda, Deluxe Oda, Default room type) with TRY currency. Exely uses Exely room types (Standart, Deluxe, Suite) with USD currency. Both use shared UI components (BulkUpdatePanel, CalendarGridView, StopSalePanel) but StopSalePanel accepts apiPrefix prop to route to correct backend. HotelRunner is in Shadow Mode, Exely is in Live Mode.
